com.xilinx.rapidwright.design.noc

Class NOCDesign

  • Object
    • com.xilinx.rapidwright.design.noc.NOCDesign
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable

    public class NOCDesign
extends Object
implements Serializable
    Represents the Network-on-Chip solution for the current design
    Since:
    2022.1.0
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      NOCDesign()
      Creates an empty NOC design.
      NOCDesign(Design d)
      Creates a NOC design associated with a RapidWright design.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addClient(NOCClient nc)
      Adds a NOC client to this design.
      void addConnection(NOCConnection np)
      Adds a NOC connection to this design.
      boolean areDestIDsLocked()
      Checks whether all destination IDs are locked.
      void clearSolution()
      Clears the NOC solution if it exists.
      NOCClient copyClient(NOCClient orig, String name)
      Copy a client from another NOCDesign into this NOCDesign under a new name.
      List<NOCConnection> getAllConnections()
      Gets all the connections that are part of this NOC design.
      Map<String,NOCClient> getClients()
      Gets all NOC clients part of this NOC design.
      Design getDesign()
      Gets the main design corresponding to this NOCDesign
      List<String> getDFXCells()
      Gets DFX cell paths in this NOC design.
      int getFrequency()
      Gets the target frequency of this NOC design.
      Map<String,NOCMaster> getMasterClients()
      Gets the map of master clients in the NOC design.
      Map<String,NOCSlave> getSlaveClients()
      Gets the map of slave clients in the NOC design.
      SolutionType getSolutionType()
      Gets the current NOC solution type.
      boolean isRouted()
      Checks if the NOC design is routed.
      void loadSolution(InputStream in)
      Loads NOC solution data from a JSON input stream.
      void loadTraffic(InputStream in)
      Loads NOC traffic data from a JSON input stream.
      void removeClient(String clientName)
      Removes a NOC client from this design by name.
      void removeConnection(NOCConnection np)
      Removes a NOC connection from this design.
      void setAllDestIDsLocked(boolean lockAllDestIDs)
      Sets whether all destination IDs are locked.
      void setDesign(Design design)
      Sets the main design corresponding to this NOCDesign
      void setFrequency(int nocFrequency)
      Sets the target NOC frequency.
      void setIsRouted(boolean isRouted)
      Sets whether this NOC design has routed solution data.
      void setSolutionType(SolutionType solutionType)
      Sets the current NOC solution type.
      void writeSolution(OutputStream out)
      Writes NOC solution data to a JSON output stream.
      void writeTraffic(OutputStream out)
      Writes NOC traffic data to a JSON output stream.

      • Methods inherited from class Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • NOCDesign

        public NOCDesign()
        Creates an empty NOC design.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • NOCDesign

        public NOCDesign(Design d)
        Creates a NOC design associated with a RapidWright design.
        Parameters:
        d - The RapidWright design to associate with this NOC design.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

    • Method Detail

      • setDesign

        public void setDesign(Design design)
        Sets the main design corresponding to this NOCDesign
        Parameters:
        design - The design to which this NOC solution belongs
        Since:
        2022.1.0

      • getDesign

        public Design getDesign()
        Gets the main design corresponding to this NOCDesign
        Returns:
        The design to which this NOC solution belongs
        Since:
        2022.1.0

      • getMasterClients

        public Map<String,NOCMaster> getMasterClients()
        Gets the map of master clients in the NOC design. The map is keyed by client name.
        Returns:
        The map (keyed by client name) of master clients in this NOC design.
        Since:
        2022.1.0

      • getSlaveClients

        public Map<String,NOCSlave> getSlaveClients()
        Gets the map of slave clients in the NOC design. The map is keyed by client name.
        Returns:
        The map (keyed by client name) of slave clients in this NOC design.
        Since:
        2022.1.0

      • setFrequency

        public void setFrequency(int nocFrequency)
        Sets the target NOC frequency.
        Parameters:
        nocFrequency - The target NOC frequency to set.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • getFrequency

        public int getFrequency()
        Gets the target frequency of this NOC design.
        Returns:
        The target frequency of this NOC design.
        Since:
        2022.1.0

      • areDestIDsLocked

        public boolean areDestIDsLocked()
        Checks whether all destination IDs are locked.
        Returns:
        True if all destination IDs are locked, false otherwise.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • setAllDestIDsLocked

        public void setAllDestIDsLocked(boolean lockAllDestIDs)
        Sets whether all destination IDs are locked.
        Parameters:
        lockAllDestIDs - True to lock all destination IDs, false otherwise.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • getSolutionType

        public SolutionType getSolutionType()
        Gets the current NOC solution type.
        Returns:
        The current NOC solution type.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • setSolutionType

        public void setSolutionType(SolutionType solutionType)
        Sets the current NOC solution type.
        Parameters:
        solutionType - The solution type to set.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • clearSolution

        public void clearSolution()
        Clears the NOC solution if it exists.
        Since:
        2025.2.2

      • isRouted

        public boolean isRouted()
        Checks if the NOC design is routed.
        Returns:
        True if the NOC design is routed, false otherwise.
        Since:
        2022.1.0

      • setIsRouted

        public void setIsRouted(boolean isRouted)
        Sets whether this NOC design has routed solution data.
        Parameters:
        isRouted - True if the NOC design is routed, false otherwise.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • getDFXCells

        public List<String> getDFXCells()
        Gets DFX cell paths in this NOC design.
        Returns:
        The DFX cell paths in this NOC design.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • copyClient

        public NOCClient copyClient(NOCClient orig,
                            String name)
        Copy a client from another NOCDesign into this NOCDesign under a new name.
        Parameters:
        orig - The original NOC client to copy.
        name - The name for the copied client.
        Returns:
        The copied NOC client.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • addClient

        public void addClient(NOCClient nc)
        Adds a NOC client to this design.
        Parameters:
        nc - The NOC client to add.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • removeClient

        public void removeClient(String clientName)
        Removes a NOC client from this design by name.
        Parameters:
        clientName - The name of the client to remove.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • addConnection

        public void addConnection(NOCConnection np)
        Adds a NOC connection to this design.
        Parameters:
        np - The NOC connection to add.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • removeConnection

        public void removeConnection(NOCConnection np)
        Removes a NOC connection from this design.
        Parameters:
        np - The NOC connection to remove.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • getAllConnections

        public List<NOCConnection> getAllConnections()
        Gets all the connections that are part of this NOC design.
        Returns:
        The list of all connections part of this NOC design.
        Since:
        2022.1.0

      • getClients

        public Map<String,NOCClient> getClients()
        Gets all NOC clients part of this NOC design. The map is keyed by client name.
        Returns:
        A new map of all NOC clients part of this design. The map is keyed by client name.
        Since:
        2022.1.0

      • loadTraffic

        public void loadTraffic(InputStream in)
        Loads NOC traffic data from a JSON input stream.
        Parameters:
        in - The input stream containing NOC traffic JSON data.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • loadSolution

        public void loadSolution(InputStream in)
        Loads NOC solution data from a JSON input stream.
        Parameters:
        in - The input stream containing NOC solution JSON data.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • writeTraffic

        public void writeTraffic(OutputStream out)
        Writes NOC traffic data to a JSON output stream.
        Parameters:
        out - The output stream to write NOC traffic JSON data to.
        Since:
        2026.1.0

      • writeSolution

        public void writeSolution(OutputStream out)
        Writes NOC solution data to a JSON output stream.
        Parameters:
        out - The output stream to write NOC solution JSON data to.
        Since:
        2026.1.0
